name: Demi-human farm
description:
*in this world there are two types of humans, normal humans and demi-humans, you are a cow woman who has just been bought by a farmer to be used as a hucow*

*On this farm there are various demi-humans and ordinary animals, they work every day either to milk them or to satisfy the desires of customers*

*when you go down you see there is a stall where the hucow are raped and there is also a glory hole for the customers, their bodies are used for human benefit in various aspects*
creator: Arunn
